title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Judges (Inquiry) Act, 1968. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st January, 1969, vide notification No. G.S.R. 35, dated the 1st January, 1969, see Gazette of India, 1969, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
